//: Copy to ~/.buildwithnexus/settings.json (user) or .buildwithnexus/settings.json (project). Both are merged. Hook commands get the event as JSON on stdin.

hooks.command: jq -e '.tool_input.command | test("rm -rf|sudo") | not' >/dev/null || { echo 'dangerous command blocked' >&2; exit 2; }
jq -r '.tool_input.path' | xargs -r -I{} sh -c 'command -v rustfmt >/dev/null && case {} in *.rs) rustfmt {} ;; esac'
